commands.repair_reason: structured ClawSweeper needs-human verdict with repairable P-severity findings (sha=5b1bebcba2b97ff1bd4ac3ff50d555ff5d804a4a)
commands.review_summary:
The branch changes session-lock cleanup so old live OpenClaw-owned locks are reported but not removed, adds regression coverage for live/non-OpenClaw/malformed locks, and updates doctor docs.

PR surface: Source +19, Tests +65, Docs 0. Total +84 across 3 files.

Reproducibility: yes. for the review finding at source level: an old live OpenClaw-owned lock remains `stale: true` and `removed: false`, while doctor still prompts `--fix` for every stale lock. I did not run a live doctor command in this read-only pass, so this is source-reproducible rather than locally reproduced.
commands.review_followup: - [P1] There is one narrow, mechanical blocker: update the doctor/reporting surface and focused tests so report-only live OpenClaw-owned locks are not presented as removable stale locks.
commands.reason: comment version already processed in ledger
